title: Prema Kavya
desc: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Raani
desc: Sarala is shocked by looking at the gifts Raani received from Sathya. Meanwhile, Raani is elated when Lohita extends her hand of friendship.

title: Muddu Sose
desc: Savitri gets caught trying to eavesdrop on Bhadra's conversation.

title: Chikkejamani
desc: Chikkejamani B.A. B.L is the story of the child-bride, Bhoomika, who is married to the foreign returned Barrister, Aniruddha. The story traces Aniruddha's struggle against society, for Bhoomika's education and to make her a Barrister.

title: Shantam Paapam
desc: Sangeet and Sarita, two college peers, meet and fall in love. Later, they decide to save up money and elope together to a new town, making their future uncertain.

title: Nandagokula
desc: Meena confronts Priya and warns her not to act. Later, Amulya makes a promise to Girija regarding instilling trust in Priya that her marriage is real.

title: Pavithra Bandhana
desc: Radhika suffers guilt for upsetting Dev about Tilak, but he still marries Pavithra to shield her from Manoj, leaving the rest of the household in a state of utter disbelief.

title: Raani
desc: Rani, who has a hearing impairment, leads a quiet life in a village with her pet goat, Cherry. However, her peaceful existence changes when she meets Arjun, a well-mannered city boy.

title: Prema Kavya
desc: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
desc: Sisters Bhagya and Lakshmi love each other unconditionally and share a close bond. Soon, Bhagya sets out in search of an ideal groom for Lakshmi who can keep her sister happy.

title: Muddu Sose
desc: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Gowri Kalyana
desc: Marriage expectations bring emotional strain as a sincere young woman seeks respect, while a man faces relentless pressure from his family to secure a wealthy alliance.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
desc: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?
